repair_history.diagnosis:
mismatched input '=' expecting ':': Invalid syntax in AGREE const declaration -> Change 'const minHeightAllowed = 200.0;' to 'const minHeightAllowed : real = 200.0;'
Couldn't resolve reference to 't': Reference to undefined variable 't' in assume statement -> Replace 't = 0.0' with 't = 0.0' (no change needed, but ensure proper variable declaration)
Expression for assume statement is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'bool': Invalid expression in assume statement -> Ensure assume statement uses valid boolean expression
Couldn't resolve reference to 'height': Reference to undefined variable 'height' in guarantee statements -> Add function call to compute height from t
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type '<error>' and 'real', but must be of the same type: Type mismatch in assignment expression -> Ensure proper type declaration for variables
missing EOF at 'var': AGREE annex syntax error due to missing semicolon after variable declaration -> add semicolon after 'var t: real = 0.0' on line 12

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 12: missing EOF at 'var': AGREE annex syntax error: 'var' keyword is not recognized in the current context because the annex is incorrectly placed at the component type level without proper enclosing structure or because of malformed annex syntax. -> Move the entire AGREE annex block from the component type (GCAS_singleton) to the implementation (GCAS_singleton.impl)
missing EOF at 'var': AGREE annex syntax error due to improper block termination -> Add closing '}' and '**' to properly terminate the annex block

/CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 24: minHeightAllowed already defined in component type contract: duplicate constant definition in implementation annex -> remove the minHeightAllowed constant declaration from the implementation annex
